title: Codonoboea kjellbergii
taxonomy: Codonoboea kjellbergii is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is a part of the genus Codonoboea, which consists of several species of flowering plants. The Gesneriaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that also includes the genus Gesneria and Saintpaulia. The family Gesneriaceae is part of the order Lamiales, which also includes the families Acanthaceae and Lamiaceae. This classification places Codonoboea kjellbergii within the larger context of flowering plant taxonomy.
